Home / player 1 Draw Away / player 2 Form reads newest → oldest · ★ = quality-adjusted 0–100 (win margins + opponent rank)

Best pick per 3-hour window

The best available pick in each upcoming 3-hour block across the next 24 h. Green = a promoted flag; otherwise the top research candidate, preferring drift-crowd (the one signal with positive out-of-sample evidence). Respects the sport filter & search.

Multibets

Research candidates — best available evidence

Picks selected by the research signals. Drift-crowd is the only component with positive out-of-sample evidence (frozen test: +22.3% ROI over 94 bets, after restricting it to sports where the crowd carries information); big-drift and consensus are unvalidated. None drive flags until the promotion gate clears them on live results — but on current evidence these rank above the model flags below.

No research signals firing in this window.

Model flags — unproven

⚠ Negative expectancy in backtest. On 9,381 games (train + frozen test, at both opening and closing prices) the core vote-EV model returned negative ROI. The earlier positive result came from a 27-bet sample and did not survive the larger one. Shown for research continuity only — see data/research/finding-2026-07-22-core-model.json.

No outcomes cleared the EV threshold this scan.

All scanned games

Every game in the window with bet365-fed odds, nearest kickoff first.

No games with odds in the current window.

Track record — settled picks

Flat 1-unit stake at the first flagged price. CLV = price taken vs closing price; consistently positive CLV means the signal beats the market.

No settled predictions yet — the record builds automatically as flagged games finish.

Model calibration

All settled predictions (flagged or not), grouped by the model's estimated win probability. Well-calibrated = predicted ≈ actual.

Calibration appears after enough games settle. Vote weight in use: .
Odds are bet365 prices via Sofascore's feed and can lag the live bet365 site by minutes. Crowd votes are debiased by fanbase size and shrunk toward the de-vigged market probability; recent form nudges the estimate; drift against the pick and confirmed absences reduce the edge. The vote weight is re-fitted from settled results as history accumulates. Screening tool, not betting advice.
